channel.title: OARN Network — Updates
channel.description: Latest updates from OARN Network — decentralized AI compute on Arbitrum.

item.title: WetLab Oracle Live on Dashboard — SDK v0.3.0
item.description: The closed-loop scientific discovery stack is now fully usable. WetLabOracle is deployed on Arbitrum Sepolia and integrated into the dashboard's Researcher view. Certified labs can submit physical experiment results on-chain; multiple lab confirmations reach consensus on reality, not just computation. SDK v0.3.0 adds getTopPredictions(), submitWetLabResult(), and getVerifiedWetLabResult().

item.title: WetLabOracle Deployed — On-Chain Physical Results
item.description: WetLabOracle is live on Arbitrum Sepolia at 0xF8991A56cB5B9073a3eEC87E95Dfb055fdDF0094. The contract lets certified labs anchor physical experiment measurements on-chain. Multiple labs confirm each result — consensus on reality closes the OARN compute → wet lab loop. GENESIS-001 Phase 2 will be the first closed-loop drug discovery run on-chain.

item.title: Dashboard Connected to Real Blockchain
item.description: Replaced all mock data in the dashboard with live on-chain reads via viem and wagmi. Task lists, balances, and consensus status now reflect real Arbitrum Sepolia state. Write operations (claim, submit, fund) connect directly to your browser wallet.

item.title: Pre-Built Node Binaries Available
item.description: oarn-node v0.1.0 pre-built binaries now available for Linux x86_64, Linux ARM64, macOS Intel, macOS Apple Silicon, and Windows 64-bit. No Rust toolchain required — download and run.

item.title: OARN Dashboard Launched
item.description: Full-featured web dashboard with 4 role-based views: Node Operator, Researcher, Crowdfunder, and Investor. Built with Next.js 14, RainbowKit wallet integration, and real-time analytics. Includes batch parameter testing for 10,000+ parallel variable combinations.

item.title: Real ONNX Model Execution Live
item.description: Nodes can now execute real ONNX models instead of placeholder mode. Added local inference testing with oarn-node inference command. Tested with linear models achieving 30ms inference time.

item.title: 3-Node Consensus Test Successful
item.description: Successfully ran a full network test with 3 local nodes on Arbitrum Sepolia. Task #4 submitted with 10 parameter combinations. All nodes achieved consensus with matching result hashes.

item.title: Investor Pitch Deck Published
item.description: 13-section investor pitch deck now available covering problem, solution, technology, tokenomics, traction, and investment opportunity. View it on our docs page.

item.title: GENESIS-001 MVP Complete
item.description: First proof-of-concept for insulin synthesis optimization completed. Local pipeline tested with 10 parameter combinations. Optimal found: 60.48% yield at 37°C, pH 6.95. Ready for network-wide testing.

item.title: Batch Task Processing Implemented
item.description: Submit 10,000+ parameter combinations in a single on-chain task. Nodes process in parallel using Rayon. 99.99% gas savings compared to individual task submissions.

item.title: SDK Published to npm
item.description: The @oarnnetwork/sdk package is now available on npm. TypeScript/JavaScript SDK for submitting tasks, batch processing, and result aggregation. Supports both ESM and CommonJS.
